subcodes.first_line: Please convey to the esteemed individual that for some time now, the conditions for havoc have been prepared in Iran, and immense difficulties have arisen [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشخص محترم عرض نمااید که مدتیست در ایران اسباب ویرانی مهیا و مشکلات عظیمه در
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @parliaments; constitutional government, @relationship between government and people, @promotion of commerce and industry, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @past, present and future of Iran
